title: Ubiquiti U7 Mesh, UniFi Wi-Fi 7 mesh system
description: The Ubiquiti U7-Mesh is a compact UniFi dual-band Wi-Fi 7 mesh AP operating simultaneously in the 2.4GHz and 5GHz bands to achieve a total throughput of up to 4.99Gbps . It is further equipped with (1) 2.5G PoE-In port , an IPX6 enclosure and supports modern technologies such as MU-MIMO , MLO and fast roaming (1) 2.5Gbps PoE-In port, dual-band 4-stream Wi-Fi 7 Total throughput up to 4.99Gbps - 688Mbps on 2.4GHz (2x2) and 4.3Gbps on 5GHz (2x2) Multi-Link Operation (MLO) - send and receive data simultaneously across different bands to increase throughput and reduce latency Fast roaming - seamless handover between access points Dual 5 GHz antennas - a combination of directional 5GHz backhaul and an omnidirectional antenna ensures reliable mesh connectivity and simultaneous coverage for local clients Devices can be connected wirelessly and via cable simultaneously for better overall throughput and reduced latency Real-time spectral analysis To manage the device, you need to download the original software called UniFi Network from the official website, which allows you to control the entire network. The undeniable advantage of UniFi Network is that it is completely free without any restrictions ! This central management allows you to upload maps and set basic parameters as well as advanced functions such as SSID, guest account, home page, traffic statistics and list and status of associated clients always easily and quickly Device Gigabit PoE injector 48V/0.32A Table stand Wall/pole mount Mounting accessories
specsSearch: Wireless features Wireless frequency 2.4 + 5 GHz (dual band) WiFi standards 802.11n, 802.11a, 802.11ac, 802.11b/g, 802.11ax, 802.11be MU-MIMO Yes Hotspot 2.0 Yes Transmission speed - 5GHz [Mb/s] 4300 Transmission speed - 2.4GHz [Mb/s] 688 Tx power 2.4GHz [dBm] 23 Tx power 5GHz [dBm] 24 2.4GHz MIMO 2 x 2 5GHz MIMO 2 x 2 Type of antenna Built-in Internal antennas 3 Roaming Yes Antenna gain [dBi] 3, 6, 10 Connectors and Interfaces LAN speed (1) 100/1000/2500Mbps Gigabit LAN Yes Power Power over Ethernet 802.3af, 42 .. 57V DC PoE type PoE-In (only) Max. power consumption [W] 13 Physical characteristics Purpose Outdoor Buttons Reset Operating temperature [°C] 30 up to 60 Weight [g] 313 Width [mm] 49 Height [mm] 160 Depth [mm] 49 Software Operating mode Access Point
